title: Assistant Store Manager - Tupperware India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Tupperware India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Tupperware India are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tupperware India:
Tupperware India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India!
